name: skilldrop
description: A collection of Claude Skills that save architects time on common deliverables — diagrams (Mermaid/PlantUML/C4, Figma, reverse-engineered from code/IaC), documentation (ADRs, design docs, runbooks, tech-comparison matrices), stakeholder communication (audience profiles, deck outlines, real .pptx generation, exec summaries, decision logs), and pipeline glue (raw-input intake, structured doc critique).
